sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Period,Co, GL, PC, UWYR, Amt1, Amt2, Flex1) (select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, PC, UWYR, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,Yr,Period,Co,GL,PC,UWYR)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex1 is NULL or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0))
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Period, Co, GL, PC, UWYR, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',[Yr],[Mo],
insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Period, Co, GL, PC, UWYR, Amt2) values ('[batchID]',[Yr],[Mo],
